metadata.description: Bam! Pow! Zoom! Tom goes full chaos mode, launching after Jerry through the creaky alley like a runaway circus act—only to get absolutely bonked by a tripwire, a rolling pie, and a trap so clever it feels like the blueprint was signed by the cartoon gods! Jerry darts, jukes, and squeaks his way through slapstick mayhem, flipping switches, springing surprises, and turning every chase into a hilariously over-the-top “whack-and-undo” moment.
